Class Subcommand

java.lang.Object
com.lwidev.survisland.api.command.Subcommand
public final class Subcommand extends Object
A subcommand of a SurvislandCommand, created via SurvislandCommand.subcommand(String). Its permission node is auto-derived as "<command permission>.<name>".

  • Method Summary

    argument(String name, com.mojang.brigadier.arguments.ArgumentType<T> type, com.mojang.brigadier.Command<io.papermc.paper.command.brigadier.CommandSourceStack> executor)
    Adds the final argument of this subcommand's chain, executed directly.

    Adds an argument alternative at the current tail of this subcommand.

  • Method Details

    • argument

      public <T> Subcommand argument(String name, com.mojang.brigadier.arguments.ArgumentType<T> type)

    • argument

      public <T> Subcommand argument(String name, com.mojang.brigadier.arguments.ArgumentType<T> type, com.mojang.brigadier.Command<io.papermc.paper.command.brigadier.CommandSourceStack> executor)
      Adds the final argument of this subcommand's chain, executed directly.

    • executes

      public Subcommand executes(com.mojang.brigadier.Command<io.papermc.paper.command.brigadier.CommandSourceStack> executor)

    • onLiteral

      public Subcommand onLiteral(String name, com.mojang.brigadier.Command<io.papermc.paper.command.brigadier.CommandSourceStack> executor)
      Adds a literal alternative (e.g. "restore") at the current tail of this subcommand.

    • onArgument

      public <T> Subcommand onArgument(String name, com.mojang.brigadier.arguments.ArgumentType<T> type, com.mojang.brigadier.Command<io.papermc.paper.command.brigadier.CommandSourceStack> executor)
      Adds an argument alternative at the current tail of this subcommand.
